mapper.select: /* McashMapper.getMcashUserByUserid */ SELECT USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER WHERE USERID = #{userid}

/* McashMapper.getMcashUserByCustomerId */ SELECT * FROM ( SELECT USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} ORDER BY RVISN_DTTM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1

/* McashMapper.getMcashUserByUserid */ SELECT USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER WHERE USERID = #{userid} AND SVC_CNTR_NO = #{svcCntrNo}
mapper.update: /* McashMapper.insertMcashUserHist */ INSERT INTO NMCP_MCASH_USER_HIST ( HIST_SEQ , USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL , EVNT_DT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM ) SELECT SQ_MCASH_USER_HIST.NEXTVAL , USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL , EVNT_DT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM FROM ( SELECT USERID , STATUS , CUSTOMER_ID , CONTRACT_NUM , SVC_CNTR_NO , STRT_DTTM , END_DTTM , EVNT_TYPE , EVNT_TYPE_DTL , EVNT_DT , REGST_ID , REGST_DTTM , RVISN_ID , RVISN_DTTM FROM NMCP_MCASH_USER WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId} ORDER BY RVISN_DTTM DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.select: /* McashMapper.getMcashMenuAccessCnt */ SELECT SUM(MENU_SEQ_CNT) FROM MV_MCP_ACCESS_TRACE WHERE MENU_SEQ IN ( SELECT MENU_SEQ FROM NMCP_USER_MENU_BAS WHERE URL_ADR IN ('/mcash/mcashView.do', '/m/mcash/mcashView.do') )
